blood_glucose.question: Please share glucose context such as CGM, fasting glucose, or recent lab values before starting the plan.
blood_glucose.reason: Blood glucose goals need stronger baseline context so the deterministic baseline stays conservative.

heart_health.reason: Heart-related goals need medication or lab context to avoid overconfident baseline recommendations.
